periods.why: Low season approaching summer. Drop from current AED 460 — currently overpriced for shoulder demand.
Heat building, tourist demand falling. Hold same low-season floor.
Hottest months (40-45°C). At PdLM long-term monthly median: AED 350 with 22% monthly discount = AED 8,190/month vs market median AED 8,300.
Hold summer floor through mid-Sep. Still 38-42°C. Demand has not yet pivoted (was 420/470 in v1 — corrected per expert critique).
Weather breaks late September. Returning expats and early-season tourists.
Tourists return as weather becomes pleasant. Family travel begins.
UK October half-term (Oct 26-30). Strong British family demand into Dubai.
Best weather month. Burj Khalifa view differentiator. Steady demand.
Inflow building toward UAE 55th National Day.
3-day UAE public holiday block.
F1 race in Abu Dhabi (140km away). Spillover only — was 1255/1400 in v1, corrected per expert + cross-checked.
Dubai Shopping Festival running, post-F1 lull on weekdays.
European travelers arriving.
Christmas peak. Set 5-night minimum. Comp median 1827 zł.
Bridge between Christmas and NYE.
4-night minimum. AED 2200 (now) defensible upper-mid for 3-review listing — was 2400/2650 in v1, corrected per expert + cross-checked.

mjl-iconic-terrace.name: MJL Iconic Terrace
mjl-iconic-terrace.subtitle: 1BR · Umm Suqeim 3 · Private terrace + pool · near Burj Al Arab

periods.why: Low season approaching summer. Drop from current ~460. Market the terrace for outdoor dining.
Heat building, demand falling. Hold same low-season floor.
Hottest months (40-45°C), Dubai's lowest tourist demand. AED 390 with 22% monthly discount = AED 9,126/month, premium tier vs MJL long-term floor of AED 6,500-7,500.
Still 38-42°C. Demand has not yet pivoted.
Weather breaks late September. MJL more expat-driven than Port de la Mer.
Tourists return. MJL's family vibe (Wild Wadi, Madinat Souk) starts paying off.
UK October half-term (Oct 26-30). MJL is THE family area in Dubai.
Best weather month. Real comp scrape shows MJL ~+1-3% over Port de la Mer (NOT +15% as initially assumed).
Inflow building toward UAE National Day.
3-day UAE public holiday. Local demand drives MJL — Burj Al Arab fireworks + Souk events.
F1 race in Abu Dhabi (140km). Demand concentrates Yas/Saadiyat. Spillover only — don't overprice.
Dubai Shopping Festival running, but post-F1 lull. MJL less DSF-driven.
European travelers arriving. MJL family appeal strongest.
Set 5-night minimum. Comp at-median for 0-review listing wouldn't beat 11-30 review competition — discount 15% below median to win.
Bridge between Christmas and NYE. Top arrivals.
4-night minimum. AED 2200 is bottom of available comp range — defensible for 0-review listing. Block early. Never discount. Lock 5-star review for 2027 marketing.
